workflowId.description: Catalog workflow identity (the lookup key for a catalog `WorkflowRef`).

catalogVersion.description: Catalog version this entry was published at (the second half of the key).

definition.description: The serialized workflow-IR payload for this catalog entry.

description:
A single published catalog entry (#65): a `(workflowId, catalogVersion)`
identity paired with its `WorkflowDefinitionV1` IR payload. A catalog
`WorkflowRef` resolves to exactly one entry whose identity pair matches.
